no: Blink Dogs are also changed in alignment to be NG, the D&D standard.Install Blink Dogs and Phase Spiders after Sword Coast Stratagems (SCS).

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

sum: Overhauls blink dog and phase spider encounters with more faithful PnP behavior, including pack tactics for blink dogs and ethereal phasing for phase spiders.
